name: lumen
title: Lumen
description: Scoped fuzzy file search across your favorite workspaces, with filters and sorting.
author: kumare_agape

commands.name: lumen
commands.title: Lumen
commands.subtitle: Find Anything
commands.description: Open the scoped fuzzy search across your workspaces.

preferences.name: firstLevelSort
preferences.title: First-Level Order
preferences.description: How to order a workspace's top level when you enter it.

preferences.name: homeExcludeWorkspaces
preferences.title: Home Search
preferences.label: Exclude configured workspaces from Home (h)
preferences.description: Home searches outside your scoped corpus; use a workspace to search inside one.

commands.name: manage-workspaces
commands.title: Manage Workspaces
commands.description: Create, edit, and delete Lumen workspaces.

commands.name: manage-tools
commands.title: Manage Tools
commands.description: Edit Lumen categories and their extensions; restore defaults.

commands.name: export-workspaces
commands.title: Export Workspaces
commands.description: Export workspaces to JSON, or import (replaces all).

commands.name: about
commands.title: About Lumen
commands.description: About Lumen and links to the source and other projects.

preferences.name: language
preferences.title: Language
preferences.description: UI language. Custom uses a language pack imported from Manage Tools.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
